```{r MDC 1 - Cat 1 WQ Vars}
MDC1.fit2_3.wq <- envfit(MDC1.wds.model, MDC1.WQ, permutations = 999, choices = c(2,3))

plot(MDC1.scores[,2], MDC1.scores[,3],
     xlab = "NMDS2", ylab = "NMDS3",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[MDC1.flow$Cat1],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="MDC 1: 1-month Flow\n 2v3 dimensions \n Sig WQ vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(MDC1.wds.model, groups = MDC1.flow$Cat1,
            choices = c(2,3),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw = "polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(MDC1.fit2_3.wq, p.max = 0.05)
```

```{r MDC 1 - Cat 3 Bio Vars}
## DIMENSIONS 1 and 2
MDC1.fit1_2.bio <- envfit(MDC1.wds.model, MDC1.BIOVEC, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,2))

plot(MDC1.scores[,1], MDC1.scores[,2],
     xlab = "NMDS1", ylab = "NMDS2",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[MDC1.flow$Cat3],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="MDC 1: 3-month Flow\n 1v2 dimensions \n Sig bio vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(MDC1.wds.model, groups = MDC1.flow$Cat3,
            choices = c(1,2),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw="polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(MDC1.fit1_2.bio, p.max = 0.05)

## DIMENSIONS 1 and 3
MDC1.fit1_3.bio <- envfit(MDC1.wds.model, MDC1.BIOVEC, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,3))

plot(MDC1.scores[,1], MDC1.scores[,3],
     xlab = "NMDS1", ylab = "NMDS3",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[MDC1.flow$Cat3],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="MDC 1: 3-month Flow\n 1v3 dimensions \n Sig bio vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(MDC1.wds.model, groups = MDC1.flow$Cat3,
            choices = c(1,3),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw = "polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(MDC1.fit1_3.bio, p.max = 0.05)

## DIMENSIONS 2 and 3
MDC1.fit2_3.bio <- envfit(MDC1.wds.model, MDC1.BIOVEC, permutations = 999, choices = c(2,3))

plot(MDC1.scores[,2], MDC1.scores[,3],
     xlab = "NMDS2", ylab = "NMDS3",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[MDC1.flow$Cat3],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="MDC 1: 3-month Flow\n 2v3 dimensions \n Sig bio vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(MDC1.wds.model, groups = MDC1.flow$Cat3,
            choices = c(2,3),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw = "polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(MDC1.fit2_3.bio, p.max = 0.05)
```

```{r MDC 1 - Cat 3 Climate Vars}
## DIMENSIONS 1 and 2
MDC1.fit1_2.clim <- envfit(MDC1.wds.model, MDC1.CLIM, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,2))

plot(MDC1.scores[,1], MDC1.scores[,2],
     xlab = "NMDS1", ylab = "NMDS2",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[MDC1.flow$Cat3],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="MDC 1: 3-month Flow\n 1v2 dimensions \n Sig Climate vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(MDC1.wds.model, groups = MDC1.flow$Cat3,
            choices = c(1,2),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw="polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(MDC1.fit1_2.bio, p.max = 0.05)

## DIMENSIONS 1 and 3
MDC1.fit1_3.clim <- envfit(MDC1.wds.model, MDC1.CLIM, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,3))

plot(MDC1.scores[,1], MDC1.scores[,3],
     xlab = "NMDS1", ylab = "NMDS3",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[MDC1.flow$Cat3],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="MDC 1: 3-month Flow\n 1v3 dimensions \n Sig Climate vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(MDC1.wds.model, groups = MDC1.flow$Cat3,
            choices = c(1,3),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw = "polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(MDC1.fit1_3.clim, p.max = 0.05)

## DIMENSIONS 2 and 3
MDC1.fit2_3.clim <- envfit(MDC1.wds.model, MDC1.CLIM, permutations = 999, choices = c(2,3))

plot(MDC1.scores[,2], MDC1.scores[,3],
     xlab = "NMDS2", ylab = "NMDS3",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[MDC1.flow$Cat3],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="MDC 1: 3-month Flow\n 2v3 dimensions \n Sig Climate vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(MDC1.wds.model, groups = MDC1.flow$Cat3,
            choices = c(2,3),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw = "polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(MDC1.fit2_3.clim, p.max = 0.05)
```

```{r MDC 1 - Cat 3 WQ Vars}
## DIMENSIONS 1 and 2
MDC1.fit1_2.wq <- envfit(MDC1.wds.model, MDC1.WQ, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,2))

plot(MDC1.scores[,1], MDC1.scores[,2],
     xlab = "NMDS1", ylab = "NMDS2",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[MDC1.flow$Cat3],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="MDC 1: 3-month Flow\n 1v2 dimensions \n Sig WQ vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(MDC1.wds.model, groups = MDC1.flow$Cat3,
            choices = c(1,2),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw="polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(MDC1.fit1_2.wq, p.max = 0.05)

## DIMENSIONS 1 and 3
MDC1.fit1_3.wq <- envfit(MDC1.wds.model, MDC1.WQ, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,3))

plot(MDC1.scores[,1], MDC1.scores[,3],
     xlab = "NMDS1", ylab = "NMDS3",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[MDC1.flow$Cat3],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="MDC 1: 3-month Flow\n 1v3 dimensions \n Sig WQ vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(MDC1.wds.model, groups = MDC1.flow$Cat3,
            choices = c(1,3),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw = "polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(MDC1.fit1_3.wq, p.max = 0.05)

## DIMENSIONS 2 and 3
MDC1.fit2_3.wq <- envfit(MDC1.wds.model, MDC1.WQ, permutations = 999, choices = c(2,3))

plot(MDC1.scores[,2], MDC1.scores[,3],
     xlab = "NMDS2", ylab = "NMDS3",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[MDC1.flow$Cat3],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="MDC 1: 3-month Flow\n 2v3 dimensions \n Sig WQ vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(MDC1.wds.model, groups = MDC1.flow$Cat3,
            choices = c(2,3),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw = "polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(MDC1.fit2_3.wq, p.max = 0.05)
```

```{r LDC 1 - Rare Removed + WDS Ordination}
LDC1.wds <- wisconsin(LDC1.BMI)

# Run the ordination
LDC1.wds.model <- metaMDS(LDC1.wds, distance = "bray", 
                                  autotransform = FALSE,
                                  k = 3,
                                  maxit = 999,
                                  trymax = 500,
                                  wascores = TRUE)

screeplot_NMDS(LDC1.wds, distance = "bray", k = 6, trymax = 500, autotransform = FALSE)
# Lower stress value indicates better fit

# Shepard plot
stressplot(LDC1.wds.model)

# Calculate goodness of fit
gof.LDC1 <- goodness(object = LDC1.wds.model)
gof.LDC1

plot(LDC1.wds.model)

# MRPP for WDS dataset, Cat 1
LDC1Cat1.WDS.MRPP <- mrpp(LDC1.wds, LDC1.flow$Cat1, permutations = 999, distance = "bray")
print(LDC1Cat1.WDS.MRPP)

# MRPP, Cat 3
LDC1Cat3.WDS.MRPP <- mrpp(LDC1.wds, LDC1.flow$Cat3, permutations = 999, distance = "bray")
print(LDC1Cat3.WDS.MRPP)

# MRPP, Cat 6
LDC1Cat6.WDS.MRPP <- mrpp(LDC1.wds, LDC1.flow$Cat6, permutations = 999, distance = "bray")
print(LDC1Cat6.WDS.MRPP)

# MRPP, Cat 12
LDC1Cat12.WDS.MRPP <- mrpp(LDC1.wds, LDC1.flow$Cat12, permutations = 999, distance = "bray")
print(LDC1Cat12.WDS.MRPP)
```

``` {r LCD 1 - Significant envrionmental variables}
# Dimensions 1 & 2 (default)
# Fit environmental vectors
# LDC1.fit_12.wds <- envfit(LDC1.wds.model, LDC1.ENV, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,2))
# 
# # Extract vector info
# arrows_12.LDC1.wds <- as.data.frame(LDC1.fit_12.wds$vectors$arrows)         # NMDS axis scores
# r2_12.LDC1.wds     <- LDC1.fit_12.wds$vectors$r                             # R-squared
# pvals_12.LDC1.wds  <- LDC1.fit_12.wds$vectors$pvals                         # p-values
# 
# # Combine into one data frame
# LDC1.sigvec_12.wds <- arrows_12.LDC1.wds %>%
#   mutate(R2 = r2_12.LDC1.wds, pval = pvals_12.LDC1.wds, Variable = rownames(arrows_12.LDC1.wds)) %>%
#   select(Variable, everything())
# 
# # Filter for significant vectors (e.g., p < 0.1)
# LDC1.sigvec_12.wds <- LDC1.sigvec_12.wds %>% filter(pval < 0.05)
#
#
# Dimensions 1 & 3
# Fit environmental vectors
# LDC1.fit_13.wds <- envfit(LDC1.wds.model, LDC1.ENV, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,3))
# 
# # Extract vector info
# arrows_13.LDC1.wds <- as.data.frame(LDC1.fit_13.wds$vectors$arrows)         # NMDS axis scores
# r2_13.LDC1.wds     <- LDC1.fit_13.wds$vectors$r                             # R-squared
# pvals_13.LDC1.wds  <- LDC1.fit_13.wds$vectors$pvals                         # p-values
# 
# # Combine into one data frame
# LDC1.sigvec_13.wds <- arrows_13.LDC1.wds %>%
#   mutate(R2 = r2_13.LDC1.wds, pval = pvals_13.LDC1.wds, Variable = rownames(arrows_13.LDC1.wds)) %>%
#   select(Variable, everything())
# 
# # Filter for significant vectors (e.g., p < 0.1)
# LDC1.sigvec_13.wds <- LDC1.sigvec_13.wds %>% filter(pval < 0.05)
# 
#
# 
# # Dimensions 2 & 3
# # Fit environmental vectors
# LDC1.fit_23.wds <- envfit(LDC1.wds.model, LDC1.ENV, permutations = 999, choices = c(2,3))
# 
# # Extract vector info
# arrows_23.LDC1.wds <- as.data.frame(LDC1.fit_23.wds$vectors$arrows)         # NMDS axis scores
# r2_23.LDC1.wds     <- LDC1.fit_23.wds$vectors$r                             # R-squared
# pvals_23.LDC1.wds  <- LDC1.fit_23.wds$vectors$pvals                         # p-values
# 
# # Combine into one data frame
# LDC1.sigvec_23.wds <- arrows_23.LDC1.wds %>%
#   mutate(R2 = r2_23.LDC1.wds, pval = pvals_23.LDC1.wds, Variable = rownames(arrows_23.LDC1.wds)) %>%
#   select(Variable, everything())
# 
# # Filter for significant vectors (e.g., p < 0.1)
# LDC1.sigvec_23.wds <- LDC1.sigvec_23.wds %>% filter(pval < 0.05)
```

```{r LDC 1 - Model axis scores}
## Extract scores (gives you the coordinates for all three axes)
LDC1.scores <- scores(LDC1.wds.model, display = "sites")
# head(UDC1.scores)
```

```{r LDC 1 - Cat 1 Bio Vars}
## DIMENSIONS 1 and 2
LDC1.fit1_2.bio <- envfit(LDC1.wds.model, LDC1.BIOVEC, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,2))

plot(LDC1.scores[,1], LDC1.scores[,2],
     xlab = "NMDS1", ylab = "NMDS2",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LDC1.flow$Cat1],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LDC 1: 1-month Flow\n 1v2 dimensions \n Sig bio vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LDC1.wds.model, groups = LDC1.flow$Cat1,
            choices = c(1,2),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw="polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LDC1.fit1_2.bio, p.max = 0.05)

## DIMENSIONS 1 and 3
LDC1.fit1_3.bio <- envfit(LDC1.wds.model, LDC1.BIOVEC, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,3))

plot(LDC1.scores[,1], LDC1.scores[,3],
     xlab = "NMDS1", ylab = "NMDS3",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LDC1.flow$Cat1],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LDC 1: 1-month Flow\n 1v3 dimensions \n Sig bio vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LDC1.wds.model, groups = LDC1.flow$Cat1,
            choices = c(1,3),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw = "polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LDC1.fit1_3.bio, p.max = 0.05)

## DIMENSIONS 2 and 3
LDC1.fit2_3.bio <- envfit(LDC1.wds.model, LDC1.BIOVEC, permutations = 999, choices = c(2,3))

plot(LDC1.scores[,2], LDC1.scores[,3],
     xlab = "NMDS2", ylab = "NMDS3",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LDC1.flow$Cat1],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LDC 1: 1-month Flow\n 2v3 dimensions \n Sig bio vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LDC1.wds.model, groups = LDC1.flow$Cat1,
            choices = c(2,3),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw = "polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LDC1.fit2_3.bio, p.max = 0.05)
```

```{r LDC 1 - Cat 1 Climate Vars}
## DIMENSIONS 1 and 2
LDC1.fit1_2.clim <- envfit(LDC1.wds.model, LDC1.CLIM, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,2))

plot(LDC1.scores[,1], LDC1.scores[,2],
     xlab = "NMDS1", ylab = "NMDS2",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LDC1.flow$Cat1],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LDC 1: 1-month Flow\n 1v2 dimensions \n Sig Climate vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LDC1.wds.model, groups = LDC1.flow$Cat1,
            choices = c(1,2),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw="polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LDC1.fit1_2.clim, p.max = 0.05)

## DIMENSIONS 1 and 3
LDC1.fit1_3.clim <- envfit(LDC1.wds.model, LDC1.CLIM, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,3))

plot(LDC1.scores[,1], LDC1.scores[,3],
     xlab = "NMDS1", ylab = "NMDS3",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LDC1.flow$Cat1],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LDC 1: 1-month Flow\n 1v3 dimensions \n Sig Climate vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LDC1.wds.model, groups = LDC1.flow$Cat1,
            choices = c(1,3),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw = "polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LDC1.fit1_3.clim, p.max = 0.05)

## DIMENSIONS 2 and 3
LDC1.fit2_3.clim <- envfit(LDC1.wds.model, LDC1.CLIM, permutations = 999, choices = c(2,3))

plot(LDC1.scores[,2], LDC1.scores[,3],
     xlab = "NMDS2", ylab = "NMDS3",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LDC1.flow$Cat1],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LDC 1: 1-month Flow\n 2v3 dimensions \n Sig Climate vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LDC1.wds.model, groups = LDC1.flow$Cat1,
            choices = c(2,3),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw = "polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LDC1.fit2_3.clim, p.max = 0.05)
```

```{r LDC 1 - Cat 1 WQ Vars}
## DIMENSIONS 1 and 2
LDC1.fit1_2.wq <- envfit(LDC1.wds.model, LDC1.WQ, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,2))

plot(LDC1.scores[,1], LDC1.scores[,2],
     xlab = "NMDS1", ylab = "NMDS2",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LDC1.flow$Cat1],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LDC 1: 1-month Flow\n 1v2 dimensions \n Sig WQ vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LDC1.wds.model, groups = LDC1.flow$Cat1,
            choices = c(1,2),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw="polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LDC1.fit1_2.wq, p.max = 0.05)

## DIMENSIONS 1 and 3
LDC1.fit1_3.wq <- envfit(LDC1.wds.model, LDC1.WQ, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,3))

plot(LDC1.scores[,1], LDC1.scores[,3],
     xlab = "NMDS1", ylab = "NMDS3",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LDC1.flow$Cat1],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LDC 1: 1-month Flow\n 1v3 dimensions \n Sig WQ vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LDC1.wds.model, groups = LDC1.flow$Cat1,
            choices = c(1,3),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw = "polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LDC1.fit1_3.wq, p.max = 0.05)

## DIMENSIONS 2 and 3
LDC1.fit2_3.wq <- envfit(LDC1.wds.model, LDC1.WQ, permutations = 999, choices = c(2,3))

plot(LDC1.scores[,2], LDC1.scores[,3],
     xlab = "NMDS2", ylab = "NMDS3",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LDC1.flow$Cat1],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LDC 1: 1-month Flow\n 2v3 dimensions \n Sig WQ vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LDC1.wds.model, groups = LDC1.flow$Cat1,
            choices = c(2,3),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw = "polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LDC1.fit2_3.wq, p.max = 0.05)
```

```{r LDC 1 - Cat 3 Bio Vars}
## DIMENSIONS 1 and 2
LDC1.fit1_2.bio <- envfit(LDC1.wds.model, LDC1.BIOVEC, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,2))

plot(LDC1.scores[,1], LDC1.scores[,2],
     xlab = "NMDS1", ylab = "NMDS2",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LDC1.flow$Cat3],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LDC 1: 3-month Flow\n 1v2 dimensions \n Sig bio vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LDC1.wds.model, groups = LDC1.flow$Cat3,
            choices = c(1,2),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw="polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LDC1.fit1_2.bio, p.max = 0.05)

## DIMENSIONS 1 and 3
LDC1.fit1_3.bio <- envfit(LDC1.wds.model, LDC1.BIOVEC, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,3))

plot(LDC1.scores[,1], LDC1.scores[,3],
     xlab = "NMDS1", ylab = "NMDS3",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LDC1.flow$Cat3],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LDC 1: 3-month Flow\n 1v3 dimensions \n Sig bio vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LDC1.wds.model, groups = LDC1.flow$Cat3,
            choices = c(1,3),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw = "polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LDC1.fit1_3.bio, p.max = 0.05)

## DIMENSIONS 2 and 3
LDC1.fit2_3.bio <- envfit(LDC1.wds.model, LDC1.BIOVEC, permutations = 999, choices = c(2,3))

plot(LDC1.scores[,2], LDC1.scores[,3],
     xlab = "NMDS2", ylab = "NMDS3",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LDC1.flow$Cat3],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LDC 1: 3-month Flow\n 2v3 dimensions \n Sig bio vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LDC1.wds.model, groups = LDC1.flow$Cat3,
            choices = c(2,3),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw = "polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LDC1.fit2_3.bio, p.max = 0.05)
```
```{r LDC 1 - Cat 3 Climate Vars}
## DIMENSIONS 1 and 2
LDC1.fit1_2.clim <- envfit(LDC1.wds.model, LDC1.CLIM, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,2))

plot(LDC1.scores[,1], LDC1.scores[,2],
     xlab = "NMDS1", ylab = "NMDS2",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LDC1.flow$Cat3],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LDC 1: 3-month Flow\n 1v2 dimensions \n Sig Climate vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LDC1.wds.model, groups = LDC1.flow$Cat3,
            choices = c(1,2),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw="polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LDC1.fit1_2.clim, p.max = 0.05)

## DIMENSIONS 1 and 3
LDC1.fit1_3.clim <- envfit(LDC1.wds.model, LDC1.CLIM, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,3))

plot(LDC1.scores[,1], LDC1.scores[,3],
     xlab = "NMDS1", ylab = "NMDS3",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LDC1.flow$Cat3],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LDC 1: 3-month Flow\n 1v3 dimensions \n Sig Climate vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LDC1.wds.model, groups = LDC1.flow$Cat3,
            choices = c(1,3),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw = "polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LDC1.fit1_3.clim, p.max = 0.05)

## DIMENSIONS 2 and 3
LDC1.fit2_3.clim <- envfit(LDC1.wds.model, LDC1.CLIM, permutations = 999, choices = c(2,3))

plot(LDC1.scores[,2], LDC1.scores[,3],
     xlab = "NMDS2", ylab = "NMDS3",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LDC1.flow$Cat3],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LDC 1: 3-month Flow\n 2v3 dimensions \n Sig Climate vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LDC1.wds.model, groups = LDC1.flow$Cat3,
            choices = c(2,3),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw = "polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LDC1.fit2_3.clim, p.max = 0.05)
```
```{r LDC 1 - Cat 3 WQ Vars}
## DIMENSIONS 1 and 2
LDC1.fit1_2.wq <- envfit(LDC1.wds.model, LDC1.WQ, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,2))

plot(LDC1.scores[,1], LDC1.scores[,2],
     xlab = "NMDS1", ylab = "NMDS2",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LDC1.flow$Cat3],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LDC 1: 3-month Flow\n 1v2 dimensions \n Sig WQ vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LDC1.wds.model, groups = LDC1.flow$Cat3,
            choices = c(1,2),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw="polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LDC1.fit1_2.wq, p.max = 0.05)

## DIMENSIONS 1 and 3
LDC1.fit1_3.wq <- envfit(LDC1.wds.model, LDC1.WQ, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,3))

plot(LDC1.scores[,1], LDC1.scores[,3],
     xlab = "NMDS1", ylab = "NMDS3",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LDC1.flow$Cat3],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LDC 1: 3-month Flow\n 1v3 dimensions \n Sig WQ vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LDC1.wds.model, groups = LDC1.flow$Cat3,
            choices = c(1,3),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw = "polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LDC1.fit1_3.wq, p.max = 0.05)

## DIMENSIONS 2 and 3
LDC1.fit2_3.wq <- envfit(LDC1.wds.model, LDC1.WQ, permutations = 999, choices = c(2,3))

plot(LDC1.scores[,2], LDC1.scores[,3],
     xlab = "NMDS2", ylab = "NMDS3",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LDC1.flow$Cat3],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LDC 1: 3-month Flow\n 2v3 dimensions \n Sig WQ vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LDC1.wds.model, groups = LDC1.flow$Cat3,
            choices = c(2,3),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw = "polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LDC1.fit2_3.wq, p.max = 0.05)
```

```{r LDC 2 - Rare Removed + WDS Ordination}
LDC2.wds <- wisconsin(LDC2.BMI)

# Run the ordination
LDC2.wds.model <- metaMDS(LDC2.wds, distance = "bray", 
                                  autotransform = FALSE,
                                  k = 3,
                                  maxit = 999,
                                  trymax = 500,
                                  wascores = TRUE)

screeplot_NMDS(LDC2.wds, distance = "bray", k = 6, trymax = 500, autotransform = FALSE)
# Lower stress value indicates better fit

# Shepard plot
stressplot(LDC2.wds.model)

# Calculate goodness of fit
gof.LDC2 <- goodness(object = LDC2.wds.model)
gof.LDC2

plot(LDC2.wds.model)

# MRPP for WDS dataset, Cat 1
LDC2Cat1.WDS.MRPP <- mrpp(LDC2.wds, LDC2.flow$Cat1, permutations = 999, distance = "bray")
print(LDC2Cat1.WDS.MRPP)

# MRPP, Cat 3
LDC2Cat3.WDS.MRPP <- mrpp(LDC2.wds, LDC2.flow$Cat3, permutations = 999, distance = "bray")
print(LDC2Cat3.WDS.MRPP)

# MRPP, Cat 6
LDC2Cat6.WDS.MRPP <- mrpp(LDC2.wds, LDC2.flow$Cat6, permutations = 999, distance = "bray")
print(LDC2Cat6.WDS.MRPP)

# MRPP, Cat 12
LDC2Cat12.WDS.MRPP <- mrpp(LDC2.wds, LDC2.flow$Cat12, permutations = 999, distance = "bray")
print(LDC2Cat12.WDS.MRPP)
```

``` {r LCD 2 - Significant envrionmental variables}
# Dimensions 1 & 2 (default)
# Fit environmental vectors
# LDC2.fit_12.wds <- envfit(LDC2.wds.model, LDC2.ENV, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,2))
# 
# # Extract vector info
# arrows_12.LDC2.wds <- as.data.frame(LDC2.fit_12.wds$vectors$arrows)         # NMDS axis scores
# r2_12.LDC2.wds     <- LDC2.fit_12.wds$vectors$r                             # R-squared
# pvals_12.LDC2.wds  <- LDC2.fit_12.wds$vectors$pvals                         # p-values
# 
# # Combine into one data frame
# LDC2.sigvec_12.wds <- arrows_12.LDC2.wds %>%
#   mutate(R2 = r2_12.LDC2.wds, pval = pvals_12.LDC2.wds, Variable = rownames(arrows_12.LDC2.wds)) %>%
#   select(Variable, everything())
# 
# # Filter for significant vectors (e.g., p < 0.1)
# LDC2.sigvec_12.wds <- LDC2.sigvec_12.wds %>% filter(pval < 0.05)
#
#
# Dimensions 1 & 3
# Fit environmental vectors
# LDC2.fit_13.wds <- envfit(LDC2.wds.model, LDC2.ENV, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,3))
# 
# # Extract vector info
# arrows_13.LDC2.wds <- as.data.frame(LDC2.fit_13.wds$vectors$arrows)         # NMDS axis scores
# r2_13.LDC2.wds     <- LDC2.fit_13.wds$vectors$r                             # R-squared
# pvals_13.LDC2.wds  <- LDC2.fit_13.wds$vectors$pvals                         # p-values
# 
# # Combine into one data frame
# LDC2.sigvec_13.wds <- arrows_13.LDC2.wds %>%
#   mutate(R2 = r2_13.LDC2.wds, pval = pvals_13.LDC2.wds, Variable = rownames(arrows_13.LDC2.wds)) %>%
#   select(Variable, everything())
# 
# # Filter for significant vectors (e.g., p < 0.1)
# LDC2.sigvec_13.wds <- LDC2.sigvec_13.wds %>% filter(pval < 0.05)
# 
#
# 
# # Dimensions 2 & 3
# # Fit environmental vectors
# LDC2.fit_23.wds <- envfit(LDC2.wds.model, LDC2.ENV, permutations = 999, choices = c(2,3))
# 
# # Extract vector info
# arrows_23.LDC2.wds <- as.data.frame(LDC2.fit_23.wds$vectors$arrows)         # NMDS axis scores
# r2_23.LDC2.wds     <- LDC2.fit_23.wds$vectors$r                             # R-squared
# pvals_23.LDC2.wds  <- LDC2.fit_23.wds$vectors$pvals                         # p-values
# 
# # Combine into one data frame
# LDC2.sigvec_23.wds <- arrows_23.LDC2.wds %>%
#   mutate(R2 = r2_23.LDC2.wds, pval = pvals_23.LDC2.wds, Variable = rownames(arrows_23.LDC2.wds)) %>%
#   select(Variable, everything())
# 
# # Filter for significant vectors (e.g., p < 0.1)
# LDC2.sigvec_23.wds <- LDC2.sigvec_23.wds %>% filter(pval < 0.05)
```

```{r LDC 2 - Model axis scores}
## Extract scores (gives you the coordinates for all three axes)
LDC2.scores <- scores(LDC2.wds.model, display = "sites")
# head(UDC1.scores)
```

```{r LDC 2 - Cat 1 Bio Vars}
## DIMENSIONS 1 and 2
LDC2.fit1_2.bio <- envfit(LDC2.wds.model, LDC2.BIOVEC, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,2))

plot(LDC2.scores[,1], LDC2.scores[,2],
     xlab = "NMDS1", ylab = "NMDS2",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LDC2.flow$Cat1],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LDC 2: 1-month Flow\n 1v2 dimensions \n Sig bio vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LDC2.wds.model, groups = LDC2.flow$Cat1,
            choices = c(1,2),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw="polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LDC2.fit1_2.bio, p.max = 0.05)

## DIMENSIONS 1 and 3
LDC2.fit1_3.bio <- envfit(LDC2.wds.model, LDC2.BIOVEC, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,3))

plot(LDC2.scores[,1], LDC2.scores[,3],
     xlab = "NMDS1", ylab = "NMDS3",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LDC2.flow$Cat1],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LDC 2: 1-month Flow\n 1v3 dimensions \n Sig bio vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LDC2.wds.model, groups = LDC2.flow$Cat1,
            choices = c(1,3),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw = "polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LDC2.fit1_3.bio, p.max = 0.05)

## DIMENSIONS 2 and 3
LDC2.fit2_3.bio <- envfit(LDC2.wds.model, LDC2.BIOVEC, permutations = 999, choices = c(2,3))

plot(LDC2.scores[,2], LDC2.scores[,3],
     xlab = "NMDS2", ylab = "NMDS3",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LDC2.flow$Cat1],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LDC 2: 1-month Flow\n 2v3 dimensions \n Sig bio vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LDC2.wds.model, groups = LDC2.flow$Cat1,
            choices = c(2,3),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw = "polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LDC2.fit2_3.bio, p.max = 0.05)
```

```{r LDC 2 - Cat 1 Climate Vars}
## DIMENSIONS 1 and 2
LDC2.fit1_2.clim <- envfit(LDC2.wds.model, LDC2.CLIM, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,2))

plot(LDC2.scores[,1], LDC2.scores[,2],
     xlab = "NMDS1", ylab = "NMDS2",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LDC2.flow$Cat1],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LDC 2: 1-month Flow\n 1v2 dimensions \n Sig Climate vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LDC2.wds.model, groups = LDC2.flow$Cat1,
            choices = c(1,2),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw="polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LDC2.fit1_2.clim, p.max = 0.05)

## DIMENSIONS 1 and 3
LDC2.fit1_3.clim <- envfit(LDC2.wds.model, LDC2.CLIM, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,3))

plot(LDC2.scores[,1], LDC2.scores[,3],
     xlab = "NMDS1", ylab = "NMDS3",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LDC2.flow$Cat1],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LDC 2: 1-month Flow\n 1v3 dimensions \n Sig Climate vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LDC2.wds.model, groups = LDC2.flow$Cat1,
            choices = c(1,3),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw = "polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LDC2.fit1_3.clim, p.max = 0.05)

## DIMENSIONS 2 and 3
LDC2.fit2_3.clim <- envfit(LDC2.wds.model, LDC2.CLIM, permutations = 999, choices = c(2,3))

plot(LDC2.scores[,2], LDC2.scores[,3],
     xlab = "NMDS2", ylab = "NMDS3",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LDC2.flow$Cat1],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LDC 2: 1-month Flow\n 2v3 dimensions \n Sig Climate vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LDC2.wds.model, groups = LDC2.flow$Cat1,
            choices = c(2,3),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw = "polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LDC2.fit2_3.clim, p.max = 0.05)
```

```{r LDC 2 - Cat 1 WQ Vars}
## DIMENSIONS 1 and 2
LDC2.fit1_2.wq <- envfit(LDC2.wds.model, LDC2.WQ, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,2))

plot(LDC2.scores[,1], LDC2.scores[,2],
     xlab = "NMDS1", ylab = "NMDS2",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LDC2.flow$Cat1],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LDC 2: 1-month Flow\n 1v2 dimensions \n Sig WQ vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LDC2.wds.model, groups = LDC2.flow$Cat1,
            choices = c(1,2),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw="polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LDC2.fit1_2.wq, p.max = 0.05)

## DIMENSIONS 1 and 3
LDC2.fit1_3.wq <- envfit(LDC2.wds.model, LDC2.WQ, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,3))

plot(LDC2.scores[,1], LDC2.scores[,3],
     xlab = "NMDS1", ylab = "NMDS3",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LDC2.flow$Cat1],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LDC 2: 1-month Flow\n 1v3 dimensions \n Sig WQ vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LDC2.wds.model, groups = LDC2.flow$Cat1,
            choices = c(1,3),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw = "polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LDC2.fit1_3.wq, p.max = 0.05)

## DIMENSIONS 2 and 3
LDC2.fit2_3.wq <- envfit(LDC2.wds.model, LDC2.WQ, permutations = 999, choices = c(2,3))

plot(LDC2.scores[,2], LDC2.scores[,3],
     xlab = "NMDS2", ylab = "NMDS3",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LDC2.flow$Cat1],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LDC 2: 1-month Flow\n 2v3 dimensions \n Sig WQ vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LDC2.wds.model, groups = LDC2.flow$Cat1,
            choices = c(2,3),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw = "polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LDC2.fit2_3.wq, p.max = 0.05)
```

```{r LDC 2 - Cat 3 Bio Vars}
## DIMENSIONS 1 and 2
LDC2.fit1_2.bio <- envfit(LDC2.wds.model, LDC2.BIOVEC, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,2))

plot(LDC2.scores[,1], LDC2.scores[,2],
     xlab = "NMDS1", ylab = "NMDS2",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LDC2.flow$Cat3],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LDC 2: 3-month Flow\n 1v2 dimensions \n Sig bio vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LDC2.wds.model, groups = LDC2.flow$Cat3,
            choices = c(1,2),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw="polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LDC2.fit1_2.bio, p.max = 0.05)

## DIMENSIONS 1 and 3
LDC2.fit1_3.bio <- envfit(LDC2.wds.model, LDC2.BIOVEC, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,3))

plot(LDC2.scores[,1], LDC2.scores[,3],
     xlab = "NMDS1", ylab = "NMDS3",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LDC2.flow$Cat3],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LDC 2: 3-month Flow\n 1v3 dimensions \n Sig bio vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LDC2.wds.model, groups = LDC2.flow$Cat3,
            choices = c(1,3),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw = "polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LDC2.fit1_3.bio, p.max = 0.05)

## DIMENSIONS 2 and 3
LDC2.fit2_3.bio <- envfit(LDC2.wds.model, LDC2.BIOVEC, permutations = 999, choices = c(2,3))

plot(LDC2.scores[,2], LDC2.scores[,3],
     xlab = "NMDS2", ylab = "NMDS3",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LDC2.flow$Cat3],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LDC 2: 3-month Flow\n 2v3 dimensions \n Sig bio vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LDC2.wds.model, groups = LDC2.flow$Cat3,
            choices = c(2,3),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw = "polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LDC2.fit2_3.bio, p.max = 0.05)
```

```{r LDC 2 - Cat 3 Climate Vars}
## DIMENSIONS 1 and 2
LDC2.fit1_2.clim <- envfit(LDC2.wds.model, LDC2.CLIM, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,2))

plot(LDC2.scores[,1], LDC2.scores[,2],
     xlab = "NMDS1", ylab = "NMDS2",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LDC2.flow$Cat3],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LDC 2: 3-month Flow\n 1v2 dimensions \n Sig Climate vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LDC2.wds.model, groups = LDC2.flow$Cat3,
            choices = c(1,2),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw="polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LDC2.fit1_2.clim, p.max = 0.05)

## DIMENSIONS 1 and 3
LDC2.fit1_3.clim <- envfit(LDC2.wds.model, LDC2.CLIM, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,3))

plot(LDC2.scores[,1], LDC2.scores[,3],
     xlab = "NMDS1", ylab = "NMDS3",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LDC2.flow$Cat3],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LDC 2: 3-month Flow\n 1v3 dimensions \n Sig Climate vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LDC2.wds.model, groups = LDC2.flow$Cat3,
            choices = c(1,3),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw = "polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LDC2.fit1_3.clim, p.max = 0.05)

## DIMENSIONS 2 and 3
LDC2.fit2_3.clim <- envfit(LDC2.wds.model, LDC2.CLIM, permutations = 999, choices = c(2,3))

plot(LDC2.scores[,2], LDC2.scores[,3],
     xlab = "NMDS2", ylab = "NMDS3",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LDC2.flow$Cat3],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LDC 2: 3-month Flow\n 2v3 dimensions \n Sig Climate vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LDC2.wds.model, groups = LDC2.flow$Cat3,
            choices = c(2,3),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw = "polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LDC2.fit2_3.clim, p.max = 0.05)
```

```{r LDC 2 - Cat 3 WQ Vars}
## DIMENSIONS 1 and 2
LDC2.fit1_2.wq <- envfit(LDC2.wds.model, LDC2.WQ, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,2))

plot(LDC2.scores[,1], LDC2.scores[,2],
     xlab = "NMDS1", ylab = "NMDS2",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LDC2.flow$Cat3],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LDC 2: 3-month Flow\n 1v2 dimensions \n Sig WQ vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LDC2.wds.model, groups = LDC2.flow$Cat3,
            choices = c(1,2),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw="polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LDC2.fit1_2.wq, p.max = 0.05)

## DIMENSIONS 1 and 3
LDC2.fit1_3.wq <- envfit(LDC2.wds.model, LDC2.WQ, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,3))

plot(LDC2.scores[,1], LDC2.scores[,3],
     xlab = "NMDS1", ylab = "NMDS3",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LDC2.flow$Cat3],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LDC 2: 3-month Flow\n 1v3 dimensions \n Sig WQ vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LDC2.wds.model, groups = LDC2.flow$Cat3,
            choices = c(1,3),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw = "polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LDC2.fit1_3.wq, p.max = 0.05)

## DIMENSIONS 2 and 3
LDC2.fit2_3.wq <- envfit(LDC2.wds.model, LDC2.WQ, permutations = 999, choices = c(2,3))

plot(LDC2.scores[,2], LDC2.scores[,3],
     xlab = "NMDS2", ylab = "NMDS3",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LDC2.flow$Cat3],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LDC 2: 3-month Flow\n 2v3 dimensions \n Sig WQ vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LDC2.wds.model, groups = LDC2.flow$Cat3,
            choices = c(2,3),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw = "polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LDC2.fit2_3.wq, p.max = 0.05)
```

```{r LDC 3 - Rare Removed + WDS Ordination}
LDC3.wds <- wisconsin(LDC3.BMI)

# Run the ordination
LDC3.wds.model <- metaMDS(LDC3.wds, distance = "bray", 
                                  autotransform = FALSE,
                                  k = 3,
                                  maxit = 999,
                                  trymax = 500,
                                  wascores = TRUE)

screeplot_NMDS(LDC3.wds, distance = "bray", k = 6, trymax = 500, autotransform = FALSE)
# Lower stress value indicates better fit

# Shepard plot
stressplot(LDC3.wds.model)

# Calculate goodness of fit
gof.LDC3 <- goodness(object = LDC3.wds.model)
gof.LDC3

plot(LDC3.wds.model)

# MRPP for WDS dataset, Cat 1
LDC3Cat1.WDS.MRPP <- mrpp(LDC3.wds, LDC3.flow$Cat1, permutations = 999, distance = "bray")
print(LDC3Cat1.WDS.MRPP)

# MRPP, Cat 3
LDC3Cat3.WDS.MRPP <- mrpp(LDC3.wds, LDC3.flow$Cat3, permutations = 999, distance = "bray")
print(LDC3Cat3.WDS.MRPP)

# MRPP, Cat 6
LDC3Cat6.WDS.MRPP <- mrpp(LDC3.wds, LDC3.flow$Cat6, permutations = 999, distance = "bray")
print(LDC3Cat6.WDS.MRPP)

# MRPP, Cat 12
LDC3Cat12.WDS.MRPP <- mrpp(LDC3.wds, LDC3.flow$Cat12, permutations = 999, distance = "bray")
print(LDC3Cat12.WDS.MRPP)
```

``` {r LCD 2 - Significant envrionmental variables}
# Dimensions 1 & 2 (default)
# Fit environmental vectors
# LDC2.fit_12.wds <- envfit(LDC2.wds.model, LDC2.ENV, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,2))
# 
# # Extract vector info
# arrows_12.LDC2.wds <- as.data.frame(LDC2.fit_12.wds$vectors$arrows)         # NMDS axis scores
# r2_12.LDC2.wds     <- LDC2.fit_12.wds$vectors$r                             # R-squared
# pvals_12.LDC2.wds  <- LDC2.fit_12.wds$vectors$pvals                         # p-values
# 
# # Combine into one data frame
# LDC2.sigvec_12.wds <- arrows_12.LDC2.wds %>%
#   mutate(R2 = r2_12.LDC2.wds, pval = pvals_12.LDC2.wds, Variable = rownames(arrows_12.LDC2.wds)) %>%
#   select(Variable, everything())
# 
# # Filter for significant vectors (e.g., p < 0.1)
# LDC2.sigvec_12.wds <- LDC2.sigvec_12.wds %>% filter(pval < 0.05)
#
#
# Dimensions 1 & 3
# Fit environmental vectors
# LDC2.fit_13.wds <- envfit(LDC2.wds.model, LDC2.ENV, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,3))
# 
# # Extract vector info
# arrows_13.LDC2.wds <- as.data.frame(LDC2.fit_13.wds$vectors$arrows)         # NMDS axis scores
# r2_13.LDC2.wds     <- LDC2.fit_13.wds$vectors$r                             # R-squared
# pvals_13.LDC2.wds  <- LDC2.fit_13.wds$vectors$pvals                         # p-values
# 
# # Combine into one data frame
# LDC2.sigvec_13.wds <- arrows_13.LDC2.wds %>%
#   mutate(R2 = r2_13.LDC2.wds, pval = pvals_13.LDC2.wds, Variable = rownames(arrows_13.LDC2.wds)) %>%
#   select(Variable, everything())
# 
# # Filter for significant vectors (e.g., p < 0.1)
# LDC2.sigvec_13.wds <- LDC2.sigvec_13.wds %>% filter(pval < 0.05)
# 
#
# 
# # Dimensions 2 & 3
# # Fit environmental vectors
# LDC2.fit_23.wds <- envfit(LDC2.wds.model, LDC2.ENV, permutations = 999, choices = c(2,3))
# 
# # Extract vector info
# arrows_23.LDC2.wds <- as.data.frame(LDC2.fit_23.wds$vectors$arrows)         # NMDS axis scores
# r2_23.LDC2.wds     <- LDC2.fit_23.wds$vectors$r                             # R-squared
# pvals_23.LDC2.wds  <- LDC2.fit_23.wds$vectors$pvals                         # p-values
# 
# # Combine into one data frame
# LDC2.sigvec_23.wds <- arrows_23.LDC2.wds %>%
#   mutate(R2 = r2_23.LDC2.wds, pval = pvals_23.LDC2.wds, Variable = rownames(arrows_23.LDC2.wds)) %>%
#   select(Variable, everything())
# 
# # Filter for significant vectors (e.g., p < 0.1)
# LDC2.sigvec_23.wds <- LDC2.sigvec_23.wds %>% filter(pval < 0.05)
```

```{r LDC 3 - Model axis scores}
## Extract scores (gives you the coordinates for all three axes)
LDC3.scores <- scores(LDC3.wds.model, display = "sites")
# head(UDC1.scores)
```

```{r LDC 3 - Cat 1 Bio Vars}
## DIMENSIONS 1 and 2
LDC3.fit1_2.bio <- envfit(LDC3.wds.model, LDC3.BIOVEC, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,2))

plot(LDC3.scores[,1], LDC3.scores[,2],
     xlab = "NMDS1", ylab = "NMDS2",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LDC3.flow$Cat1],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LDC 3: 1-month Flow\n 1v2 dimensions \n Sig bio vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LDC3.wds.model, groups = LDC3.flow$Cat1,
            choices = c(1,2),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw="polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LDC3.fit1_2.bio, p.max = 0.05)

## DIMENSIONS 1 and 3
LDC3.fit1_3.bio <- envfit(LDC3.wds.model, LDC3.BIOVEC, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,3))

plot(LDC3.scores[,1], LDC3.scores[,3],
     xlab = "NMDS1", ylab = "NMDS3",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LDC3.flow$Cat1],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LDC 3: 1-month Flow\n 1v3 dimensions \n Sig bio vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LDC3.wds.model, groups = LDC3.flow$Cat1,
            choices = c(1,3),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw = "polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LDC3.fit1_3.bio, p.max = 0.05)

## DIMENSIONS 2 and 3
LDC3.fit2_3.bio <- envfit(LDC3.wds.model, LDC3.BIOVEC, permutations = 999, choices = c(2,3))

plot(LDC3.scores[,2], LDC3.scores[,3],
     xlab = "NMDS2", ylab = "NMDS3",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LDC3.flow$Cat1],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LDC 3: 1-month Flow\n 2v3 dimensions \n Sig bio vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LDC3.wds.model, groups = LDC3.flow$Cat1,
            choices = c(2,3),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw = "polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LDC3.fit2_3.bio, p.max = 0.05)
```

```{r LDC 3 - Cat 1 Climate Vars}
## DIMENSIONS 1 and 2
LDC3.fit1_2.clim <- envfit(LDC3.wds.model, LDC3.CLIM, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,2))

plot(LDC3.scores[,1], LDC3.scores[,2],
     xlab = "NMDS1", ylab = "NMDS2",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LDC3.flow$Cat1],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LDC 3: 1-month Flow\n 1v2 dimensions \n Sig Climate vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LDC3.wds.model, groups = LDC3.flow$Cat1,
            choices = c(1,2),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw="polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LDC3.fit1_2.clim, p.max = 0.05)

## DIMENSIONS 1 and 3
LDC3.fit1_3.clim <- envfit(LDC3.wds.model, LDC3.CLIM, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,3))

plot(LDC3.scores[,1], LDC3.scores[,3],
     xlab = "NMDS1", ylab = "NMDS3",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LDC3.flow$Cat1],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LDC 3: 1-month Flow\n 1v3 dimensions \n Sig Climate vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LDC3.wds.model, groups = LDC3.flow$Cat1,
            choices = c(1,3),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw = "polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LDC3.fit1_3.clim, p.max = 0.05)

## DIMENSIONS 2 and 3
LDC3.fit2_3.clim <- envfit(LDC3.wds.model, LDC3.CLIM, permutations = 999, choices = c(2,3))

plot(LDC3.scores[,2], LDC3.scores[,3],
     xlab = "NMDS2", ylab = "NMDS3",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LDC3.flow$Cat1],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LDC 3: 1-month Flow\n 2v3 dimensions \n Sig Climate vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LDC3.wds.model, groups = LDC3.flow$Cat1,
            choices = c(2,3),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw = "polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LDC3.fit2_3.clim, p.max = 0.05)
```

```{r LDC 3 - Cat 1 WQ Vars}
## DIMENSIONS 1 and 2
LDC3.fit1_2.wq <- envfit(LDC3.wds.model, LDC3.WQ, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,2))

plot(LDC3.scores[,1], LDC3.scores[,2],
     xlab = "NMDS1", ylab = "NMDS2",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LDC3.flow$Cat1],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LDC 3: 1-month Flow\n 1v2 dimensions \n Sig WQ vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LDC3.wds.model, groups = LDC3.flow$Cat1,
            choices = c(1,2),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw="polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LDC3.fit1_2.wq, p.max = 0.05)

## DIMENSIONS 1 and 3
LDC3.fit1_3.wq <- envfit(LDC3.wds.model, LDC3.WQ, permutŵtions = 999, choices = c(1,3))

plot(LDC3.scores[,1], LDC3.scores[,3],
     xlab = "NMDS1", ylab = "NMDS3",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LDC3.flow$Cat1],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LDC 3: 1-month Flow\n 1v3 dimensions \n Sig WQ vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LDC3.wds.model, groups = LDC3.flow$Cat1,
            choices = c(1,3),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw = "polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LDC3.fit1_3.wq, p.max = 0.05)

## DIMENSIONS 2 and 3
LDC3.fit2_3.wq <- envfit(LDC3.wds.model, LDC3.WQ, permutations = 999, choices = c(2,3))

plot(LDC3.scores[,2], LDC3.scores[,3],
     xlab = "NMDS2", ylab = "NMDS3",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LDC3.flow$Cat1],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LDC 3: 1-month Flow\n 2v3 dimensions \n Sig WQ vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LDC3.wds.model, groups = LDC3.flow$Cat1,
            choices = c(2,3),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw = "polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LDC3.fit2_3.wq, p.max = 0.05)
```

```{r LDC 3 - Cat 3 Bio Vars}
## DIMENSIONS 1 and 2
LDC3.fit1_2.bio <- envfit(LDC3.wds.model, LDC3.BIOVEC, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,2))

plot(LDC3.scores[,1], LDC3.scores[,2],
     xlab = "NMDS1", ylab = "NMDS2",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LDC3.flow$Cat3],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LDC 3: 3-month Flow\n 1v2 dimensions \n Sig bio vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LDC3.wds.model, groups = LDC3.flow$Cat3,
            choices = c(1,2),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw="polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LDC3.fit1_2.bio, p.max = 0.05)

## DIMENSIONS 1 and 3
LDC3.fit1_3.bio <- envfit(LDC3.wds.model, LDC3.BIOVEC, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,3))

plot(LDC3.scores[,1], LDC3.scores[,3],
     xlab = "NMDS1", ylab = "NMDS3",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LDC3.flow$Cat3],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LDC 3: 3-month Flow\n 1v3 dimensions \n Sig bio vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LDC3.wds.model, groups = LDC3.flow$Cat3,
            choices = c(1,3),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw = "polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LDC3.fit1_3.bio, p.max = 0.05)

## DIMENSIONS 2 and 3
LDC3.fit2_3.bio <- envfit(LDC3.wds.model, LDC3.BIOVEC, permutations = 999, choices = c(2,3))

plot(LDC3.scores[,2], LDC3.scores[,3],
     xlab = "NMDS2", ylab = "NMDS3",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LDC3.flow$Cat3],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LDC 3: 3-month Flow\n 2v3 dimensions \n Sig bio vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LDC3.wds.model, groups = LDC3.flow$Cat3,
            choices = c(2,3),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw = "polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LDC3.fit2_3.bio, p.max = 0.05)
```

```{r LDC 3 - Cat 3 Climate Vars}
## DIMENSIONS 1 and 2
LDC3.fit1_2.clim <- envfit(LDC3.wds.model, LDC3.CLIM, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,2))

plot(LDC3.scores[,1], LDC3.scores[,2],
     xlab = "NMDS1", ylab = "NMDS2",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LDC3.flow$Cat3],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LDC 3: 3-month Flow\n 1v2 dimensions \n Sig Climate vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LDC3.wds.model, groups = LDC3.flow$Cat3,
            choices = c(1,2),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw="polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LDC3.fit1_2.clim, p.max = 0.05)

## DIMENSIONS 1 and 3
LDC3.fit1_3.clim <- envfit(LDC3.wds.model, LDC3.CLIM, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,3))

plot(LDC3.scores[,1], LDC3.scores[,3],
     xlab = "NMDS1", ylab = "NMDS3",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LDC3.flow$Cat3],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LDC 3: 3-month Flow\n 1v3 dimensions \n Sig Climate vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LDC3.wds.model, groups = LDC3.flow$Cat3,
            choices = c(1,3),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw = "polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LDC3.fit1_3.clim, p.max = 0.05)

## DIMENSIONS 2 and 3
LDC3.fit2_3.clim <- envfit(LDC3.wds.model, LDC3.CLIM, permutations = 999, choices = c(2,3))

plot(LDC3.scores[,2], LDC3.scores[,3],
     xlab = "NMDS2", ylab = "NMDS3",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LDC3.flow$Cat3],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LDC 3: 3-month Flow\n 2v3 dimensions \n Sig Climate vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LDC3.wds.model, groups = LDC3.flow$Cat3,
            choices = c(2,3),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw = "polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LDC3.fit2_3.clim, p.max = 0.05)
```

```{r LDC 3 - Cat 3 WQ Vars}
## DIMENSIONS 1 and 2
LDC3.fit1_2.wq <- envfit(LDC3.wds.model, LDC3.WQ, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,2))

plot(LDC3.scores[,1], LDC3.scores[,2],
     xlab = "NMDS1", ylab = "NMDS2",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LDC3.flow$Cat3],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LDC 3: 3-month Flow\n 1v2 dimensions \n Sig WQ vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LDC3.wds.model, groups = LDC3.flow$Cat3,
            choices = c(1,2),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw="polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LDC3.fit1_2.wq, p.max = 0.05)

## DIMENSIONS 1 and 3
LDC3.fit1_3.wq <- envfit(LDC3.wds.model, LDC3.WQ, permutŵtions = 999, choices = c(1,3))

plot(LDC3.scores[,1], LDC3.scores[,3],
     xlab = "NMDS1", ylab = "NMDS3",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LDC3.flow$Cat3],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LDC 3: 3-month Flow\n 1v3 dimensions \n Sig WQ vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LDC3.wds.model, groups = LDC3.flow$Cat3,
            choices = c(1,3),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw = "polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LDC3.fit1_3.wq, p.max = 0.05)

## DIMENSIONS 2 and 3
LDC3.fit2_3.wq <- envfit(LDC3.wds.model, LDC3.WQ, permutations = 999, choices = c(2,3))

plot(LDC3.scores[,2], LDC3.scores[,3],
     xlab = "NMDS2", ylab = "NMDS3",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LDC3.flow$Cat3],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LDC 3: 3-month Flow\n 2v3 dimensions \n Sig WQ vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LDC3.wds.model, groups = LDC3.flow$Cat3,
            choices = c(2,3),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw = "polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LDC3.fit2_3.wq, p.max = 0.05)
```
```{r LtDC - Rare Removed + WDS Ordination}
LtDC.wds <- wisconsin(LtDC.BMI)

# Run the ordination
LtDC.wds.model <- metaMDS(LtDC.wds, distance = "bray", 
                                  autotransform = FALSE,
                                  k = 3,
                                  maxit = 999,
                                  trymax = 500,
                                  wascores = TRUE)

screeplot_NMDS(LtDC.wds, distance = "bray", k = 6, trymax = 500, autotransform = FALSE)
# Lower stress value indicates better fit

# Shepard plot
stressplot(LtDC.wds.model)

# Calculate goodness of fit
gof.LtDC <- goodness(object = LtDC.wds.model)
gof.LtDC

plot(LtDC.wds.model)

# MRPP for WDS dataset, Cat 1
LtDCCat1.WDS.MRPP <- mrpp(LtDC.wds, LtDC.flow$Cat1, permutations = 999, distance = "bray")
print(LtDCCat1.WDS.MRPP)

# MRPP, Cat 3
LtDCCat3.WDS.MRPP <- mrpp(LtDC.wds, LtDC.flow$Cat3, permutations = 999, distance = "bray")
print(LtDCCat3.WDS.MRPP)

# MRPP, Cat 6
LtDCCat6.WDS.MRPP <- mrpp(LtDC.wds, LtDC.flow$Cat6, permutations = 999, distance = "bray")
print(LtDCCat6.WDS.MRPP)

# MRPP, Cat 12
LtDCCat12.WDS.MRPP <- mrpp(LtDC.wds, LtDC.flow$Cat12, permutations = 999, distance = "bray")
print(LtDCCat12.WDS.MRPP)
```

``` {r LtDC - Significant envrionmental variables}
# # Dimensions 1 & 2 (default)
# # Fit environmental vectors
# LtDC.fit_12.wds <- envfit(LtDC.wds.model, LtDC.ENV, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,2))
# 
# # Extract vector info
# arrows_12.LtDC.wds <- as.data.frame(LtDC.fit_12.wds$vectors$arrows)         # NMDS axis scores
# r2_12.LtDC.wds     <- LtDC.fit_12.wds$vectors$r                             # R-squared
# pvals_12.LtDC.wds  <- LtDC.fit_12.wds$vectors$pvals                         # p-values
# 
# # Combine into one data frame
# LtDC.sigvec_12.wds <- arrows_12.LtDC.wds %>%
#   mutate(R2 = r2_12.LtDC.wds, pval = pvals_12.LtDC.wds, Variable = rownames(arrows_12.LtDC.wds)) %>%
#   select(Variable, everything())
# 
# # Filter for significant vectors (e.g., p < 0.1)
# LtDC.sigvec_12.wds <- LtDC.sigvec_12.wds %>% filter(pval < 0.05)
# 
# 
# Dimensions 1 & 3
# Fit environmental vectors
# LtDC.fit_13.wds <- envfit(LtDC.wds.model, LtDC.ENV, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,3))
# 
# # Extract vector info
# arrows_13.LtDC.wds <- as.data.frame(LtDC.fit_13.wds$vectors$arrows)         # NMDS axis scores
# r2_13.LtDC.wds     <- LtDC.fit_13.wds$vectors$r                             # R-squared
# pvals_13.LtDC.wds  <- LtDC.fit_13.wds$vectors$pvals                         # p-values
# 
# # Combine into one data frame
# LtDC.sigvec_13.wds <- arrows_13.LtDC.wds %>%
#   mutate(R2 = r2_13.LtDC.wds, pval = pvals_13.LtDC.wds, Variable = rownames(arrows_13.LtDC.wds)) %>%
#   select(Variable, everything())
# 
# # Filter for significant vectors (e.g., p < 0.1)
# LtDC.sigvec_13.wds <- LtDC.sigvec_13.wds %>% filter(pval < 0.05)
# 
# 
# 
# # Dimensions 2 & 3
# # Fit environmental vectors
# LtDC.fit_23.wds <- envfit(LtDC.wds.model, LtDC.ENV, permutations = 999, choices = c(2,3))
# 
# # Extract vector info
# arrows_23.LtDC.wds <- as.data.frame(LtDC.fit_23.wds$vectors$arrows)         # NMDS axis scores
# r2_23.LtDC.wds     <- LtDC.fit_23.wds$vectors$r                             # R-squared
# pvals_23.LtDC.wds  <- LtDC.fit_23.wds$vectors$pvals                         # p-values
# 
# # Combine into one data frame
# LtDC.sigvec_23.wds <- arrows_23.LtDC.wds %>%
#   mutate(R2 = r2_23.LtDC.wds, pval = pvals_23.LtDC.wds, Variable = rownames(arrows_23.LtDC.wds)) %>%
#   select(Variable, everything())
# 
# # Filter for significant vectors (e.g., p < 0.1)
# LtDC.sigvec_23.wds <- LtDC.sigvec_23.wds %>% filter(pval < 0.05)
```

```{r LDC 1 - Model axis scores}
## Extract scores (gives you the coordinates for all three axes)
LtDC.scores <- scores(LtDC.wds.model, display = "sites")
# head(UDC1.scores)
```

```{r LtDC - Cat 1 Bio Vars}
## DIMENSIONS 1 and 2
LtDC.fit1_2.bio <- envfit(LtDC.wds.model, LtDC.BIOVEC, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,2))

plot(LtDC.scores[,1], LtDC.scores[,2],
     xlab = "NMDS1", ylab = "NMDS2",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LtDC.flow$Cat1],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LtDC: 1-month Flow\n 1v2 dimensions \n Sig bio vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LtDC.wds.model, groups = LtDC.flow$Cat1,
            choices = c(1,2),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw="polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LtDC.fit1_2.bio, p.max = 0.05)

## DIMENSIONS 1 and 3
LtDC.fit1_3.bio <- envfit(LtDC.wds.model, LtDC.BIOVEC, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,3))

plot(LtDC.scores[,1], LtDC.scores[,3],
     xlab = "NMDS1", ylab = "NMDS3",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LtDC.flow$Cat1],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LtDC: 1-month Flow\n 1v3 dimensions \n Sig bio vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LtDC.wds.model, groups = LtDC.flow$Cat1,
            choices = c(1,3),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw = "polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LtDC.fit1_3.bio, p.max = 0.05)

## DIMENSIONS 2 and 3
LtDC.fit2_3.bio <- envfit(LtDC.wds.model, LtDC.BIOVEC, permutations = 999, choices = c(2,3))

plot(LtDC.scores[,2], LtDC.scores[,3],
     xlab = "NMDS2", ylab = "NMDS3",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LtDC.flow$Cat1],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LtDC: 1-month Flow\n 2v3 dimensions \n Sig bio vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LtDC.wds.model, groups = LtDC.flow$Cat1,
            choices = c(2,3),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw = "polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LtDC.fit2_3.bio, p.max = 0.05)
```

```{r LtDC - Cat 1 Climate Vars}
## DIMENSIONS 1 and 2
LtDC.fit1_2.clim <- envfit(LtDC.wds.model, LtDC.CLIM, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,2))

plot(LtDC.scores[,1], LtDC.scores[,2],
     xlab = "NMDS1", ylab = "NMDS2",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LtDC.flow$Cat1],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LtDC: 1-month Flow\n 1v2 dimensions \n Sig Climate vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LtDC.wds.model, groups = LtDC.flow$Cat1,
            choices = c(1,2),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw="polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LtDC.fit1_2.clim, p.max = 0.05)

## DIMENSIONS 1 and 3
LtDC.fit1_3.clim <- envfit(LtDC.wds.model, LtDC.CLIM, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,3))

plot(LtDC.scores[,1], LtDC.scores[,3],
     xlab = "NMDS1", ylab = "NMDS3",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LtDC.flow$Cat1],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LtDC: 1-month Flow\n 1v3 dimensions \n Sig Climate vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LtDC.wds.model, groups = LtDC.flow$Cat1,
            choices = c(1,3),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw = "polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LtDC.fit1_3.clim, p.max = 0.05)

## DIMENSIONS 2 and 3
LtDC.fit2_3.clim <- envfit(LtDC.wds.model, LtDC.CLIM, permutations = 999, choices = c(2,3))

plot(LtDC.scores[,2], LtDC.scores[,3],
     xlab = "NMDS2", ylab = "NMDS3",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LtDC.flow$Cat1],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LtDC: 1-month Flow\n 2v3 dimensions \n Sig Climate vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LtDC.wds.model, groups = LtDC.flow$Cat1,
            choices = c(2,3),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw = "polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LtDC.fit2_3.clim, p.max = 0.05)
```

```{r LtDC - Cat 1 Climate Vars}
## DIMENSIONS 1 and 2
LtDC.fit1_2.wq <- envfit(LtDC.wds.model, LtDC.WQ, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,2))

plot(LtDC.scores[,1], LtDC.scores[,2],
     xlab = "NMDS1", ylab = "NMDS2",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LtDC.flow$Cat1],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LtDC: 1-month Flow\n 1v2 dimensions \n Sig WQ vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LtDC.wds.model, groups = LtDC.flow$Cat1,
            choices = c(1,2),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw="polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LtDC.fit1_2.wq, p.max = 0.05)

## DIMENSIONS 1 and 3
LtDC.fit1_3.wq <- envfit(LtDC.wds.model, LtDC.WQ, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,3))

plot(LtDC.scores[,1], LtDC.scores[,3],
     xlab = "NMDS1", ylab = "NMDS3",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LtDC.flow$Cat1],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LtDC: 1-month Flow\n 1v3 dimensions \n Sig WQw vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LtDC.wds.model, groups = LtDC.flow$Cat1,
            choices = c(1,3),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw = "polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LtDC.fit1_3.wq, p.max = 0.05)

## DIMENSIONS 2 and 3
LtDC.fit2_3.wq <- envfit(LtDC.wds.model, LtDC.WQ, permutations = 999, choices = c(2,3))

plot(LtDC.scores[,2], LtDC.scores[,3],
     xlab = "NMDS2", ylab = "NMDS3",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LtDC.flow$Cat1],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LtDC: 1-month Flow\n 2v3 dimensions \n Sig Climate vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LtDC.wds.model, groups = LtDC.flow$Cat1,
            choices = c(2,3),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw = "polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LtDC.fit2_3.wq, p.max = 0.05)
```

```{r LtDC - Cat 3 Bio Vars}
## DIMENSIONS 1 and 2
LtDC.fit1_2.bio <- envfit(LtDC.wds.model, LtDC.BIOVEC, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,2))

plot(LtDC.scores[,1], LtDC.scores[,2],
     xlab = "NMDS1", ylab = "NMDS2",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LtDC.flow$Cat3],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LtDC: 3-month Flow\n 1v2 dimensions \n Sig bio vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LtDC.wds.model, groups = LtDC.flow$Cat3,
            choices = c(1,2),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw="polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LtDC.fit1_2.bio, p.max = 0.05)

## DIMENSIONS 1 and 3
LtDC.fit1_3.bio <- envfit(LtDC.wds.model, LtDC.BIOVEC, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,3))

plot(LtDC.scores[,1], LtDC.scores[,3],
     xlab = "NMDS1", ylab = "NMDS3",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LtDC.flow$Cat3],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LtDC: 3-month Flow\n 1v3 dimensions \n Sig bio vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LtDC.wds.model, groups = LtDC.flow$Cat3,
            choices = c(1,3),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw = "polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LtDC.fit1_3.bio, p.max = 0.05)

## DIMENSIONS 2 and 3
LtDC.fit2_3.bio <- envfit(LtDC.wds.model, LtDC.BIOVEC, permutations = 999, choices = c(2,3))

plot(LtDC.scores[,2], LtDC.scores[,3],
     xlab = "NMDS2", ylab = "NMDS3",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LtDC.flow$Cat3],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LtDC: 3-month Flow\n 2v3 dimensions \n Sig bio vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LtDC.wds.model, groups = LtDC.flow$Cat3,
            choices = c(2,3),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw = "polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LtDC.fit2_3.bio, p.max = 0.05)
```

```{r LtDC - Cat 3 Climate Vars}
## DIMENSIONS 1 and 2
LtDC.fit1_2.clim <- envfit(LtDC.wds.model, LtDC.CLIM, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,2))

plot(LtDC.scores[,1], LtDC.scores[,2],
     xlab = "NMDS1", ylab = "NMDS2",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LtDC.flow$Cat3],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LtDC: 3-month Flow\n 1v2 dimensions \n Sig Climate vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LtDC.wds.model, groups = LtDC.flow$Cat3,
            choices = c(1,2),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw="polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LtDC.fit1_2.clim, p.max = 0.05)

## DIMENSIONS 1 and 3
LtDC.fit1_3.clim <- envfit(LtDC.wds.model, LtDC.CLIM, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,3))

plot(LtDC.scores[,1], LtDC.scores[,3],
     xlab = "NMDS1", ylab = "NMDS3",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LtDC.flow$Cat3],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LtDC: 3-month Flow\n 1v3 dimensions \n Sig Climate vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LtDC.wds.model, groups = LtDC.flow$Cat3,
            choices = c(1,3),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw = "polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LtDC.fit1_3.clim, p.max = 0.05)

## DIMENSIONS 2 and 3
LtDC.fit2_3.clim <- envfit(LtDC.wds.model, LtDC.CLIM, permutations = 999, choices = c(2,3))

plot(LtDC.scores[,2], LtDC.scores[,3],
     xlab = "NMDS2", ylab = "NMDS3",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LtDC.flow$Cat3],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LtDC: 3-month Flow\n 2v3 dimensions \n Sig Climate vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LtDC.wds.model, groups = LtDC.flow$Cat3,
            choices = c(2,3),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw = "polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LtDC.fit2_3.clim, p.max = 0.05)
```
```{r LtDC - Cat 3 Climate Vars}
## DIMENSIONS 1 and 2
LtDC.fit1_2.wq <- envfit(LtDC.wds.model, LtDC.WQ, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,2))

plot(LtDC.scores[,1], LtDC.scores[,2],
     xlab = "NMDS1", ylab = "NMDS2",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LtDC.flow$Cat3],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LtDC: 3-month Flow\n 1v2 dimensions \n Sig WQ vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LtDC.wds.model, groups = LtDC.flow$Cat3,
            choices = c(1,2),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw="polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LtDC.fit1_2.wq, p.max = 0.05)

## DIMENSIONS 1 and 3
LtDC.fit1_3.wq <- envfit(LtDC.wds.model, LtDC.WQ, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,3))

plot(LtDC.scores[,1], LtDC.scores[,3],
     xlab = "NMDS1", ylab = "NMDS3",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LtDC.flow$Cat3],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LtDC: 3-month Flow\n 1v3 dimensions \n Sig WQw vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LtDC.wds.model, groups = LtDC.flow$Cat3,
            choices = c(1,3),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw = "polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LtDC.fit1_3.wq, p.max = 0.05)

## DIMENSIONS 2 and 3
LtDC.fit2_3.wq <- envfit(LtDC.wds.model, LtDC.WQ, permutations = 999, choices = c(2,3))

plot(LtDC.scores[,2], LtDC.scores[,3],
     xlab = "NMDS2", ylab = "NMDS3",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[LtDC.flow$Cat3],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="LtDC: 3-month Flow\n 2v3 dimensions \n Sig Climate vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(LtDC.wds.model, groups = LtDC.flow$Cat3,
            choices = c(2,3),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw = "polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(LtDC.fit2_3.wq, p.max = 0.05)
```
```{r SC - Rare Removed + WDS Ordination}
SC.wds <- wisconsin(SC.BMI)

# Run the ordination
SC.wds.model <- metaMDS(SC.wds, distance = "bray", 
                                  autotransform = FALSE,
                                  k = 3,
                                  maxit = 999,
                                  trymax = 500,
                                  wascores = TRUE)

screeplot_NMDS(SC.wds, distance = "bray", k = 6, trymax = 500, autotransform = FALSE)
# Lower stress value indicates better fit

# Shepard plot
stressplot(SC.wds.model)

# Calculate goodness of fit
gof.SC <- goodness(object = SC.wds.model)
gof.SC

plot(SC.wds.model)

# MRPP for WDS dataset, Cat 1
SCCat1.WDS.MRPP <- mrpp(SC.wds, SC.flow$Cat1, permutations = 999, distance = "bray")
print(SCCat1.WDS.MRPP)

# MRPP, Cat 3
SCCat3.WDS.MRPP <- mrpp(SC.wds, SC.flow$Cat3, permutations = 999, distance = "bray")
print(SCCat3.WDS.MRPP)

# MRPP, Cat 6
SCCat6.WDS.MRPP <- mrpp(SC.wds, SC.flow$Cat6, permutations = 999, distance = "bray")
print(SCCat6.WDS.MRPP)

# MRPP, Cat 12
SCCat12.WDS.MRPP <- mrpp(SC.wds, SC.flow$Cat12, permutations = 999, distance = "bray")
print(SCCat12.WDS.MRPP)
```

``` {r SC - Significant envrionmental variables}
# # Dimensions 1 & 2 (default)
# # Fit environmental vectors
# SCC.fit_12.wds <- envfit(SC.wds.model, SC.ENV, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,2))
# 
# # Extract vector info
# arrows_12.SC.wds <- as.data.frame(SC.fit_12.wds$vectors$arrows)         # NMDS axis scores
# r2_12.SC.wds     <- SC.fit_12.wds$vectors$r                             # R-squared
# pvals_12.SC.wds  <- SC.fit_12.wds$vectors$pvals                         # p-values
# 
# # Combine into one data frame
# SC.sigvec_12.wds <- arrows_12.SC.wds %>%
#   mutate(R2 = r2_12.SC.wds, pval = pvals_12.SC.wds, Variable = rownames(arrows_12.SC.wds)) %>%
#   select(Variable, everything())
# 
# # Filter for significant vectors (e.g., p < 0.1)
# SC.sigvec_12.wds <- SC.sigvec_12.wds %>% filter(pval < 0.05)
# 
# 
# # Dimensions 1 & 3
# # Fit environmental vectors
# SC.fit_13.wds <- envfit(SC.wds.model, SC.ENV, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,3))
# 
# # Extract vector info
# arrows_13.SC.wds <- as.data.frame(SC.fit_13.wds$vectors$arrows)         # NMDS axis scores
# r2_13.SC.wds     <- SC.fit_13.wds$vectors$r                             # R-squared
# pvals_13.SC.wds  <- SC.fit_13.wds$vectors$pvals                         # p-values
# 
# # Combine into one data frame
# SC.sigvec_13.wds <- arrows_13.SC.wds %>%
#   mutate(R2 = r2_13.SC.wds, pval = pvals_13.SC.wds, Variable = rownames(arrows_13.SC.wds)) %>%
#   select(Variable, everything())
# 
# # Filter for significant vectors (e.g., p < 0.1)
# SC.sigvec_13.wds <- SCC.sigvec_13.wds %>% filter(pval < 0.05)
# 
# 
# 
# # Dimensions 2 & 3
# # Fit environmental vectors
# SC.fit_23.wds <- envfit(SC.wds.model, SC.ENV, permutations = 999, choices = c(2,3))
# 
# # Extract vector info
# arrows_23.SC.wds <- as.data.frame(SC.fit_23.wds$vectors$arrows)         # NMDS axis scores
# r2_23.SC.wds     <- SC.fit_23.wds$vectors$r                             # R-squared
# pvals_23.SC.wds  <- SC.fit_23.wds$vectors$pvals                         # p-values
# 
# # Combine into one data frame
# SC.sigvec_23.wds <- arrows_23.SC.wds %>%
#   mutate(R2 = r2_23.SC.wds, pval = pvals_23.SC.wds, Variable = rownames(arrows_23.SC.wds)) %>%
#   select(Variable, everything())
# 
# # Filter for significant vectors (e.g., p < 0.1)
# SC.sigvec_23.wds <- SC.sigvec_23.wds %>% filter(pval < 0.05)
```
 

```{r SC - Model axis scores}
## Extract scores (gives you the coordinates for all three axes)
SC.scores <- scores(LtDC.wds.model, display = "sites")
# head(UDC1.scores)
```

```{r SC - Cat 1 Bio Vars}
## DIMENSIONS 1 and 2
SC.fit1_2.bio <- envfit(SC.wds.model, SC.BIOVEC, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,2))

plot(SC.scores[,1], SC.scores[,2],
     xlab = "NMDS1", ylab = "NMDS2",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[SC.flow$Cat1],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="SC: 1-month Flow\n 1v2 dimensions \n Sig bio vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(SC.wds.model, groups = SC.flow$Cat1,
            choices = c(1,2),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw="polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(SC.fit1_2.bio, p.max = 0.05)

## DIMENSIONS 1 and 3
SC.fit1_3.bio <- envfit(SC.wds.model, SC.BIOVEC, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,3))

plot(SC.scores[,1], SC.scores[,3],
     xlab = "NMDS1", ylab = "NMDS3",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[SC.flow$Cat1],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="SC: 1-month Flow\n 1v3 dimensions \n Sig bio vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(SC.wds.model, groups = SC.flow$Cat1,
            choices = c(1,3),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw = "polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(SC.fit1_3.bio, p.max = 0.05)

## DIMENSIONS 2 and 3
SC.fit2_3.bio <- envfit(SC.wds.model, SC.BIOVEC, permutations = 999, choices = c(2,3))

plot(SC.scores[,2], SC.scores[,3],
     xlab = "NMDS2", ylab = "NMDS3",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[SC.flow$Cat1],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="SC: 1-month Flow\n 2v3 dimensions \n Sig bio vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(SC.wds.model, groups = SC.flow$Cat1,
            choices = c(2,3),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw = "polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(SC.fit2_3.bio, p.max = 0.05)
```
```{r SC - Cat 1 Climate Vars}
## DIMENSIONS 1 and 2
SC.fit1_2.clim <- envfit(SC.wds.model, SC.CLIM, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,2))

plot(SC.scores[,1], SC.scores[,2],
     xlab = "NMDS1", ylab = "NMDS2",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[SC.flow$Cat1],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="SC: 1-month Flow\n 1v2 dimensions \n Sig Climate vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(SC.wds.model, groups = SC.flow$Cat1,
            choices = c(1,2),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw="polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(SC.fit1_2.clim, p.max = 0.05)

## DIMENSIONS 1 and 3
SC.fit1_3.clim <- envfit(SC.wds.model, SC.CLIM, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,3))

plot(SC.scores[,1], SC.scores[,3],
     xlab = "NMDS1", ylab = "NMDS3",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[SC.flow$Cat1],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="SC: 1-month Flow\n 1v3 dimensions \n Sig bio vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(SC.wds.model, groups = SC.flow$Cat1,
            choices = c(1,3),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw = "polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(SC.fit1_3.clim, p.max = 0.05)

## DIMENSIONS 2 and 3
SC.fit2_3.clim <- envfit(SC.wds.model, SC.CLIM, permutations = 999, choices = c(2,3))

plot(SC.scores[,2], SC.scores[,3],
     xlab = "NMDS2", ylab = "NMDS3",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[SC.flow$Cat1],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="SC: 1-month Flow\n 2v3 dimensions \n Sig Climate vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(SC.wds.model, groups = SC.flow$Cat1,
            choices = c(2,3),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw = "polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(SC.fit2_3.clim, p.max = 0.05)
```

```{r SC - Cat 1 WQ Vars}
## DIMENSIONS 1 and 2
SC.fit1_2.wq <- envfit(SC.wds.model, SC.WQ, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,2))

plot(SC.scores[,1], SC.scores[,2],
     xlab = "NMDS1", ylab = "NMDS2",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[SC.flow$Cat1],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="SC: 1-month Flow\n 1v2 dimensions \n Sig WQ vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(SC.wds.model, groups = SC.flow$Cat1,
            choices = c(1,2),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw="polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(SC.fit1_2.wq, p.max = 0.05)

## DIMENSIONS 1 and 3
```
