```{r SC - Cat 1 WQ Vars}
SC.fit1_3.wq <- envfit(SC.wds.model, SC.WQ, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,3))

plot(SC.scores[,1], SC.scores[,3],
     xlab = "NMDS1", ylab = "NMDS3",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[SC.flow$Cat1],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="SC: 1-month Flow\n 1v3 dimensions \n Sig WQ vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(SC.wds.model, groups = SC.flow$Cat1,
            choices = c(1,3),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw = "polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(SC.fit1_3.wq, p.max = 0.05)

## DIMENSIONS 2 and 3
SC.fit2_3.wq <- envfit(SC.wds.model, SC.WQ, permutations = 999, choices = c(2,3))

plot(SC.scores[,2], SC.scores[,3],
     xlab = "NMDS2", ylab = "NMDS3",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[SC.flow$Cat1],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="SC: 1-month Flow\n 2v3 dimensions \n Sig WQ vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(SC.wds.model, groups = SC.flow$Cat1,
            choices = c(2,3),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw = "polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(SC.fit2_3.wq, p.max = 0.05)
```

```{r SC - Cat 3 Bio Vars}
## DIMENSIONS 1 and 2
SC.fit1_2.bio <- envfit(SC.wds.model, SC.BIOVEC, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,2))

plot(SC.scores[,1], SC.scores[,2],
     xlab = "NMDS1", ylab = "NMDS2",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[SC.flow$Cat3],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="SC: 3-month Flow\n 1v2 dimensions \n Sig bio vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(SC.wds.model, groups = SC.flow$Cat3,
            choices = c(1,2),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw="polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(SC.fit1_2.bio, p.max = 0.05)

## DIMENSIONS 1 and 3
SC.fit1_3.bio <- envfit(SC.wds.model, SC.BIOVEC, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,3))

plot(SC.scores[,1], SC.scores[,3],
     xlab = "NMDS1", ylab = "NMDS3",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[SC.flow$Cat3],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="SC: 3-month Flow\n 1v3 dimensions \n Sig bio vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(SC.wds.model, groups = SC.flow$Cat3,
            choices = c(1,3),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw = "polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(SC.fit1_3.bio, p.max = 0.05)

## DIMENSIONS 2 and 3
SC.fit2_3.bio <- envfit(SC.wds.model, SC.BIOVEC, permutations = 999, choices = c(2,3))

plot(SC.scores[,2], SC.scores[,3],
     xlab = "NMDS2", ylab = "NMDS3",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[SC.flow$Cat3],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="SC: 3-month Flow\n 2v3 dimensions \n Sig bio vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(SC.wds.model, groups = SC.flow$Cat3,
            choices = c(2,3),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw = "polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(SC.fit2_3.bio, p.max = 0.05)
```
```{r SC - Cat 3 Climate Vars}
## DIMENSIONS 1 and 2
SC.fit1_2.clim <- envfit(SC.wds.model, SC.CLIM, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,2))

plot(SC.scores[,1], SC.scores[,2],
     xlab = "NMDS1", ylab = "NMDS2",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[SC.flow$Cat3],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="SC: 3-month Flow\n 1v2 dimensions \n Sig Climate vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(SC.wds.model, groups = SC.flow$Cat3,
            choices = c(1,2),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw="polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(SC.fit1_2.clim, p.max = 0.05)

## DIMENSIONS 1 and 3
SC.fit1_3.clim <- envfit(SC.wds.model, SC.CLIM, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,3))

plot(SC.scores[,1], SC.scores[,3],
     xlab = "NMDS1", ylab = "NMDS3",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[SC.flow$Cat3],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="SC: 3-month Flow\n 1v3 dimensions \n Sig bio vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(SC.wds.model, groups = SC.flow$Cat3,
            choices = c(1,3),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw = "polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(SC.fit1_3.clim, p.max = 0.05)

## DIMENSIONS 2 and 3
SC.fit2_3.clim <- envfit(SC.wds.model, SC.CLIM, permutations = 999, choices = c(2,3))

plot(SC.scores[,2], SC.scores[,3],
     xlab = "NMDS2", ylab = "NMDS3",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[SC.flow$Cat3],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="SC: 3-month Flow\n 2v3 dimensions \n Sig Climate vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(SC.wds.model, groups = SC.flow$Cat3,
            choices = c(2,3),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw = "polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(SC.fit2_3.clim, p.max = 0.05)
```

```{r SC - Cat 3 WQ Vars}
## DIMENSIONS 1 and 2
SC.fit1_2.wq <- envfit(SC.wds.model, SC.WQ, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,2))

plot(SC.scores[,1], SC.scores[,2],
     xlab = "NMDS1", ylab = "NMDS2",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[SC.flow$Cat3],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="SC: 3-month Flow\n 1v2 dimensions \n Sig WQ vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(SC.wds.model, groups = SC.flow$Cat3,
            choices = c(1,2),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw="polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(SC.fit1_2.wq, p.max = 0.05)

## DIMENSIONS 1 and 3
SC.fit1_3.wq <- envfit(SC.wds.model, SC.WQ, permutations = 999, choices = c(1,3))

plot(SC.scores[,1], SC.scores[,3],
     xlab = "NMDS1", ylab = "NMDS3",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[SC.flow$Cat3],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="SC: 3-month Flow\n 1v3 dimensions \n Sig WQ vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(SC.wds.model, groups = SC.flow$Cat3,
            choices = c(1,3),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw = "polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(SC.fit1_3.wq, p.max = 0.05)

## DIMENSIONS 2 and 3
SC.fit2_3.wq <- envfit(SC.wds.model, SC.WQ, permutations = 999, choices = c(2,3))

plot(SC.scores[,2], SC.scores[,3],
     xlab = "NMDS2", ylab = "NMDS3",
     pch = 21, bg = color.by.cat[SC.flow$Cat3],  
     col = "black", cex = 1.5,
     main="SC: 3-month Flow\n 2v3 dimensions \n Sig WQ vectors(p<0.1)");
legend("topright", legend = names(color.by.cat),              
       fill = color.by.cat, title = "Flow", bty = "n");
ordiellipse(SC.wds.model, groups = SC.flow$Cat3,
            choices = c(2,3),
            col = color.by.cat,
            draw = "polygon", label = T, cex = 0.5);
plot(SC.fit2_3.wq, p.max = 0.05)
```
